title: Bee Reactor Adapter enables serverless Powerhouse Connect on Swarm
content:
The Bee Reactor Adapter delivers decentralized storage and encrypted chat for [Powerhouse Connect](https://powerhouse.io) on the [Swarm](https://ethswarm.org) network, eliminating the need for centralized servers.

Core capabilities:
- Encrypt documents with the user's Ethereum wallet
- Store encrypted data on Swarm
- Recover on any device using just a wallet signature
- Share drives with other users
- Chat directly peer-to-peer via PSS + GSOC

The adapter integrates as a native reactor `IChannel` via `createSwarmSyncBuilder()`. The Connect fork wires it into `ReactorBuilder.withSync()` at build time, so Swarm remotes persist in `sync_remotes` and survive page reloads natively alongside GQL channels. The landing page forces wallet login, the plugin syncs all drives and docs to Swarm automatically, and exposes a chat panel from the sidebar.
description: The Bee Reactor Adapter provides decentralized storage and encrypted peer-to-peer chat for Powerhouse Connect using the Swarm network, with no centralized servers required.
